title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Housing.com has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
